name: Savory Mini Cheesecakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cheddar cheese, cottage cheese, horseradish, mayonnaise, diced canadian bacon, chopped chives, salt, and white pepper in a food processor.
2. Process until smooth and well blended.
3. Spoon the mixture into an ungreased mini-muffin pan, filling each cavity about two-thirds full.
4. Cover the pan with plastic wrap or aluminum foil and refrigerate for 4 to 48 hours, allowing the cheesecakes to set completely.
5. To unmold, run a knife around the edges of each muffin before inverting onto a serving platter or individual serving plates.
6. Garnish as desired.
7. Serve slightly chilled or at room temperature alongside assorted savory crackers.
